article_title: Minimal API vs Controller：ASP.NET Core 中两种 API 风格怎么选
core_theme: ASP.NET Core 中 Minimal API 和 Controller 两种 API 构建方式的全面对比
reader_takeaway: 理解两种方式各自的优势和适用场景，能根据项目和团队实际情况做出选择
summary_angle: 两条不同的路通向同一个目的地——构建生产级 API，关键在于选择适配自己场景的那条

information_blocks.source_anchor: Minimal API 语法简洁、少样板；Controller 结构显式、过滤器完整
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧轻量箭头/简洁路径，右侧结构化的建筑/框架

information_blocks.source_anchor: .NET 10 中两者功能差距大幅缩小，都能构建生产级 API
微服务/函数式团队选 Minimal API；大型团队/复杂领域选 Controller
information_blocks.visual_idea: 分叉路径各自通往不同的场景标识

main_metaphor: 两条分叉但最终交汇的路，一侧简洁利落，一侧结构扎实
primary_subject: 两条风格迥异但目标相同的路径/道路
subject_action: 从同一原点分叉，各自延伸后又在远端交汇
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: contemporary Chinese anime-comic illustration, crisp linework, ornate but controlled details, vibrant fantasy-tech color accents

final_prompt: wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. conceptual editorial illustration combined with contemporary Chinese anime-comic style, crisp linework, ornate but controlled details, vibrant fantasy-tech color accents. A split-path composition: from a single starting point on the left, two distinct roads diverge -- the upper path is minimal, clean, streamlined with light floating code-like symbols; the lower path is structured, architectural, with solid geometric foundations. Both paths converge toward the right side where they reach the same destination. Small Chinese label chips: '简洁 vs 结构' on the left fork area, '.NET 10' near the convergence zone, '场景适配' near the right destination. Deep blue and warm orange contrast palette. No UI screenshots, no dashboards, no fake charts, no neon cityscape, no robots, no cyberpunk glow pollution.
